text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: TRÈS BIEEEN! I'm so glad you both finally made it here!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I've been using my drones to observe your exquisite display of beauty
from afar.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Really?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Thank you... I think?

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Ahem! But things are not over just yet. I still have to witness your
proposal! Make your vows!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Let's start with you, Hishi Akebono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Well... To me, a racer's outfit is a treat you get as a reward.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's a special kind of buono you can only receive after giving it your
all and prevailing over a challenge.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Running a race with friends while wearing your racewear should be
just as fun as enjoying snack time with everyone.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That's why I vow to get a special racewear outfit along with everyone
and run lots of buono races together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
You don't want an outfit just for yourself, but for everyone? For
someone who seems so carefree, you have unexpectedly big 
ambitions!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. My mom did always say "the bigger, the better." ♪

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Indeed! I couldn't agree more! ♪ Okay, next up is Mayano Top Gun!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I wanna grow up to be a strong, mature woman!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, I always thought I wanted to run an amazing race in a
beautiful outfit in order to become a twinkly lady...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But after this audition... I know that's not what I want.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
What I truly want is to become someone who not only makes myself
shine, but others as well!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So I'll need my racewear to help make me twinkly so I can make
others twinkly too!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I vow to become an Umamusume worthy of my racewear!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ What a beautiful proposal! ☆

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono and Mayano Top Gun, naturally, the results of your
audition are...

The curtains fall on the exciting audition, and the day of the Beauty
Dream Cup finally arrives...

The successful candidates of the audition are garbed in their new
racewear, awaiting the start of the race.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, what do you think of the dresses that I specifically designed for
you?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: They're incredible! I feel like a real-life princess!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Wow! It's so fluffy and yummy-looking! It's such a buono dress. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I love it, but... is it really okay for me to receive such a wonderful
garment?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You're planning to become worthy of it, right? If it ever seems like it
might get taken from you, you gotta cling on to it with your dying
breath!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Haha... Yes, you're right. I should wear this with strong conviction... or
at least, I should try.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well said, Dober. I couldn't agree more.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
(This dress is truly the work of a first-rate designer. It's similar to my
mother's racewear but unique in its own way. What remarkable
craftsmanship.)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ms. Beauty, your dress design and hairstyling for me are out of this
world! ♪ It feels like I've evolved into a real woman! ☆

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thank you for the lovely praise. ☆ Okay, ladies! It's time to go!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
A runway fit for my beautiful muses and the très bien racewear I
designed awaits...

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Come now! To the stage of the Beauty Dream Cup!

text_block_list.name: Event Caster
text_block_list.text:
Our racers, clad in new racewear designed by the great Beauty
Anshinzawa, are off to a flying start!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Each dress truly is remarkable in its own way! As for our racers, they're
all exceptional Umamusume who managed to pass a rigorous audition
process.

text_block_list.name: Event Caster
text_block_list.text: Oh! Mayano Top Gun suddenly surges into the lead!

text_block_list.name: Event Caster
text_block_list.text: But Air Groove is hot on her heels! And trailing just behind them—

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober, Kawakami Princess, and Hishi Akebono are in hot
pursuit!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's attention is on me! ☆ They're all totally charmed by my
dazzling racing figure. ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Even though this is just an exhibition race, my goal is still the
same—to show the audience my best and cross the finish line first!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Air Groove's mother has come to watch, so it's no wonder she's fired
up... Even so, I don't intend to lose!)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to rip through the finish line, and no one can stop me! Keep
your eyes on me, my future Prince Charming!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Racing is so much fun! It's so buono, buono! ♪

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
(Hehe. Every single one of them is blindingly dazzling! Ah, this is
exactly why I can never get enough of this job!)

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: You're all stunning beauties, my dears!
